heroSubtitle: Purpose-built software products you can use today
intro: Beyond consulting, we build and sell specialised software products that address real industry challenges. Our products are born from hands-on experience working with businesses just like yours.

products.name: qMechanic
products.description: qMechanic is a comprehensive digital platform designed specifically for HGV workshops and fleet operators. It streamlines vehicle inspections, manages job cards, and keeps your compliance documentation organised and accessible.

features.title: Digital Inspections
features.description: Complete DVSA-compliant inspections on tablet or mobile with photo capture and digital signatures

features.title: Job Card Management
features.description: Create, assign, and track repair jobs from start to finish with full audit trails

features.title: Defect Tracking
features.description: Log and monitor vehicle defects with severity ratings and resolution tracking

features.title: Compliance Reports
features.description: Generate inspection reports and compliance documentation instantly

features.title: Fleet Overview
features.description: Dashboard view of your entire fleet's maintenance status and upcoming inspections

features.title: Workshop Scheduling
features.description: Plan and schedule workshop capacity and technician assignments

products.name: qHaul
products.description: qHaul is our upcoming transport management system designed to give haulage operators complete control over their operations. From job booking to proof of delivery, qHaul streamlines every aspect of transport management.

features.title: Job Management
features.description: Book, schedule, and manage transport jobs with customer and load details

features.title: Driver App
features.description: Mobile app for drivers with job details, navigation, and digital POD capture

features.title: Real-Time Tracking
features.description: Live visibility of vehicle locations and job status updates

features.title: Customer Portal
features.description: Self-service portal for customers to book jobs and track deliveries

features.title: Invoicing Integration
features.description: Automatic invoice generation based on completed jobs and rates

features.title: Analytics Dashboard
features.description: Insights into fleet utilisation, revenue, and operational efficiency

benefits: Reduce admin time with automated invoicing

products.name: Solar
products.description: Solar is a modern project management platform purpose-built for agencies, consultancies, and service businesses. It sits between heavyweight tools like Jira and lightweight ones like Linear — designed specifically for teams that manage work for other people. The killer differentiator: a fully branded client portal, native AI agent access via MCP, and built-in time tracking and billing.

features.title: AI Agent Access (MCP)
features.description: Every project gets an MCP endpoint that AI agents like Claude and Cursor can connect to directly — creating tickets, managing epics, updating knowledge bases with scoped permissions

features.title: Branded Client Portal
features.description: A fully white-labelled portal your clients log into under your brand. They submit tickets, track progress, view hours, browse your knowledge base — all without ever seeing our name

features.title: Kanban & Sprint Management
features.description: Drag-and-drop boards with custom columns, swimlanes by epic, assignee, priority or queue, WIP limits, sprint planning with velocity tracking and burndown charts

features.title: Time Tracking & Billing
features.description: Built-in timesheets, per-issue time logging, prepaid hour buckets with expiration, and client-visible time entries. No more spreadsheets or separate billing tools

features.title: Knowledge Base
features.description: Hierarchical docs with sections, tagging, full-text search, revision history, and client visibility controls. Ship internal and client-facing guides from the same system

features.title: White-Label Ready
features.description: Custom logo, colours, favicon, and portal branding per organisation. Multi-tenant from day one with organisation-level settings, member roles, and project isolation

benefits: Give clients real-time visibility without sharing your internal tools
Let AI agents manage your backlog as first-class crew members
Track time and bill clients from the same platform you manage work in
Present a fully branded experience — clients never see our name
Replace Jira, Toggl, Notion, and your client update emails with one tool
Segment work with queues across teams — frontend, backend, support, design

cta.title: Interested in Our Products?
cta.description: Explore Solar for project management, qMechanic for fleet inspections, or register your interest in qHaul.
